content:
Define typed directed relation records
Add a refutable relation model and SQLite custody distinct from identity crosswalks.
Acceptance: stable round-trip; invalid revisions fail closed; Fab/Somm fixture proves crosswalk and attempt_of remain separate.

Add relation traversal and explanation
Query directed incoming/outgoing relations and expose them separately in activity and CLI.
Acceptance: direction/refutation respected; activity distinguishes links/relations; George-Fab-Somm CLI fixture passes.

Derive finding action state from receipts
Project current disposition, historical ever_acted_on, and freshness from exact finding revisions and valid external receipt relations.
Acceptance: no receipt means not acted-on; explicit refutation updates disposition; coverage loss cannot erase valid action history; George fixture derives one result.

Add finding review CLI primitives
Implement list/show/revise/refute/relate/export commands over append-only finding history.
Acceptance: no source mutation; evidence/manifest/action visible; full CLI create-refute-export-read flow passes.

Trust-contract live checkpoint
Ingest a bounded live store and verify one Fab-Somm and one George-Fab-Git trace.
Acceptance: no fuzzy joins; identity and relations independently inspectable; redacted receipt reproducible by documented command.

Specify attribution states and conservation
Define attributed, ambiguous, unallocated, method precedence, reason codes, and v1 single-allocation policy.
Acceptance: outcome types distinct; association-only paths abstain; mixed fixture conserves selected amounts.

Build exact attribution paths
Resolve selected cost to eligible outcomes using event families, identity, and directed relations with explainable paths.
Acceptance: every path carries record ids; no silent double allocation; competing George-Fab-Somm-Git fixture becomes ambiguous.

Add milton cost --per-outcome
Expose time/outcome filters and schema-versioned text/JSON attribution output.
Acceptance: all buckets/paths/coverage present; economic uncertainty honest; CLI totals reconcile to milton accounting.

Add outcome projection regression fixtures
Cover landed, failed, abandoned, runner-only, multi-outcome, missing-link, rollup, replay, and window seams.
Acceptance: deleting direction/ambiguity/conservation fails tests; rollups cannot inflate totals; ingest-to-projection fixtures pass.

Ten-trace outcome checkpoint
Independently audit ten representative priced traces and make a graduate/narrow decision.
Acceptance: totals conserve; every trace has path or reason; report chooses graduation, runner-only narrowing, or named producer gap.

Normalize George gate evidence
Recover canonical gate coordinate, mint, consult, decision, disposition, and referenced PR/fix evidence with coverage.
Acceptance: coordinate/mint distinct; missing reads unknown; host-shaped repeated/resolved gate fixture passes adapter flow.

Implement deterministic gate detectors
Add separate stale-condition, re-mint, and old-unconsulted versioned rules with abstention and dry run.
Acceptance: positive/negative/ambiguous/stale fixtures; no action or self-promotion; replay appends stable findings once.

Wire finding generation and evaluation CLI
Add generate/dry-run/evaluate commands and persist generator snapshot/precision metadata.
Acceptance: dry-run and append equivalent; below-floor generator cannot corroborate; full CLI flow passes.

Build and review labeled gate corpus
Sample, redact, independently label, freeze, and score gate families.
Acceptance: rationale and source coordinates; tuning/held-out split; evaluation yields surface/offline/narrow decision consumed by generator.

Export findings to George intake contract
Emit immutable taint-aware candidate documents and ingest returned disposition receipts as directed relations.
Acceptance: complete versioned evidence; idempotent round trip; simulated George flow derives action without Python dependency.

Live acted-on finding checkpoint
Send one reviewed gate finding through accepted George authority and re-ingest its receipt.
Acceptance: George acts/refuses; Milton derives exactly one result; report measures burden and graduate/narrow/kill outcome.

Execute Somm accounting-integrity commission
Ledger shadow gold/judge calls with actual tokens and make OTLP export-reingest idempotent while exposing provider ids/provenance.
Acceptance: auxiliary requests once each; one billable row after round trip; Milton adapter consumes accepted fixture without special duplicate filter.

Expand the Somm evidence adapter
Ingest accepted auxiliary calls, eval receipts, campaigns, decisions, recommendations, and late updates; exclude rollup costs.
Acceptance: no aggregate billable amounts; missing tables fail open; host fixture passes activity/accounting/outcome projections.

Execute Fab identity-receipts commission
Persist commission, attempt, verifier, artifact, terminal, and Somm/native coordinates across retries without creating cost.
Acceptance: explicit ids survive retry/restart; aggregates reference child keys; Milton traverses without stdout matching.

Ingest stable Fab verifier and artifact receipts
Discover accepted receipts and emit verifies/produced relations while referencing artifacts.
Acceptance: missing proof not code failure; rollups not cost; end-to-end fixture shows evidence in activity and attribution.

Execute George finding-disposition commission
Accept deduplicated Milton candidates through normal authority and return stable dispositions/actions.
Acceptance: preserve finding revision; Milton cannot close gates; accepted receipt derives one action through public contract.

Reconcile Somm overlap and export tuple evidence
Align source-local/hot-path ownership and export versioned implementation/profile/model/harness outcomes with cutoff, sample, uncertainty, and coverage.
Acceptance: ownership tables agree; Somm totals declare scope; integration fixture proves evidence-only consumption and safe fallback without automatic policy change.

Build finding-quality evaluation harness
Version cases/splits/metrics and enforce tuple-bound per-generator promotion floors.
Acceptance: held-out separation; refutations calibrate later runs; stale-gate generator uses the same measured gate.

Compare direct analysis with facet clustering
Evaluate direct model analysis against facet-cluster-describe under equal corpus, budget, and held-out cases. If an external engine wins, publish a build-versus-adopt exception covering the full license/runtime chain, commercial compatibility, offline operation, pinned provenance, SBOM/security review, data exit, and replacement fixture.
Acceptance: same evidence tuple; cost/stability/counterexamples retained; only winning method integrated; Milton-owned or every docs/build-vs-adopt.md gate passes; open-core/hosted requirements, floating installers, incomplete license review, or failed replacement block graduation.

Ship bounded failure-motif and drift findings
Implement accepted synthesis method with recurrence, receipt corroboration, privacy thresholds, and expiry.
Acceptance: no self-corroboration; small groups abstain; live bounded scan matches evaluation tolerance.

Audit two memory systems
Model inventory/loaded/retrieved/referenced/applied/unknown across factory-native file/rules/skills and decision-memory stores; keep agentmemory optional for existing operators.
Acceptance: retrieval not causality; missing signals unknown; no agentmemory/iii runtime dependency; end-to-end audit covers both and links a reviewed simulated action.

Export idempotent Chip procedure candidates
Map findings to candidates with occurrence/counterexample/fixture refs and stable source identity.
Acceptance: replay cannot inflate count; negative fixtures preserved; Milton-Chip-receipt contract test passes.

Close one procedure promotion outcome loop
Preserve Milton origin through Chip/Spindle/Fab/Somm receipts and compare pinned post-promotion outcome with baseline.
Acceptance: Spindle owns binding; exact tuple identified; Milton records improvement/regression/inconclusive and updates calibration.
